programs.title: Truck Dynasty
programs.sub_title: It's a Boat. It's a Truck. It's BoatTruck
programs.desc: Due to a windfall from a custom project, Joe plans to create the Boat Truck, an amphibious Jeep; with a buyer for the Defender falling through, Pop, Jerry Jr. and Frank are tasked with finding buyers for both the Defender and the Boat Truck.

programs.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programs.desc: With just a month left of the season, both crews are closing in on gold; a life-threatening accident at Dustin's site forces his crew out of the water.

programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: A failed assassination unleashes claims of a mind-controlled gunman; Andrew investigates the CIA's legacy of MK-Ultra, and stages a shocking experiment with mentalist Max Major to test whether a person really can be hypnotized into becoming an assassin.

programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programs.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programs.desc: Andrew investigates what really happened to Jeffrey Epstein; by reconstructing the crime scene using insider insights, expert analysis and a full replica of his jail cell, he tests whether the evidence points to suicide, murder or something darker.
